title: Before Destabilization
storyPurpose: Mission: reach sanctuary before Spark destabilizes; shadowed hunter on ridge.

panels.description: Mira packs travel kit; Spark half-asleep against Bramblefox; Mossprig and Thornling ready. she checks her Compact lantern charm.

bubbles.text: Take Spark to Shellward Sanctum before the pulse frays.

bubbles.text: We walk. We invite. We don't make it a weapon.

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "Spark's Journey" Issue #2, STORY PAGE 6/25 — Before Destabilization. Story purpose: Mission: reach sanctuary before Spark destabilizes; shadowed hunter on ridge. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p6a): Mira packs travel kit; Spark half-asleep against Bramblefox; Mossprig and Thornling ready. she checks her Compact lantern charm. Panel 2 (p6b): Distant rooftop/ridge: Veiled Meridian hunter silhouette with tracking lens and three-arc sigil charm. Commons below unaware. Characters: mira-eggwarden, mira-eggwarden. Creatures: spark, bramblefox, mossprig, thornling. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, unstable glow when frightened, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Environment: Riftwild Commons fringe. Time: dawn. Weather: post-storm clear. Lighting: soft dawn amber with cyan accents. Continuity: {"hunters":{"status":"observing","faction":"Veiled Meridian","tracking":"pending"},"mission":"active","time":"morning"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Take Spark to Shellward Sanctum before the pulse frays.
SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): We walk. We invite. We don't make it a weapon.
WHISPER (Hunter Spotter): Subject One lives. Mark the trail.
NARRATION: Some invitations arrive with knives.
